Solve.title: Solucionador
Solve.description: Tire uma foto ou digite sua pergunta. Eu resolvo passo-a-passo na hora.

Write.title: Redator
Write.description: Assistente de redação por IA. Crie esboços, expanda ideias, adicione citações e muito mais.

Humanize.title: Humanizador de IA
Humanize.description: Reescreva textos gerados por IA para soarem naturais. Burle detectores com um clique.

Map.title: Seu Mapa de Conhecimento
Map.description: O Axiom rastreia os assuntos que você pesquisa e estima sua maestria. Quanto mais você explora e resolve, mais inteligente esse mapa fica.
Map.noDataDesc: Comece a resolver problemas no Chat para construir seu perfil de conhecimento.

Settings.title: Configurações
Settings.achievementsDesc: Resolva problemas diariamente para desbloquear selos e aumentar sua ofensiva.
Settings.planProDesc: Acesso ilimitado a todos os recursos

Learn.title: Tutor Interativo
Learn.description: Seu companheiro de estudos com IA. Pergunte qualquer coisa — "Ensine cálculo do zero".
Learn.askMeAnythingDesc: Pergunte qualquer coisa — "Me ensine derivadas do zero", "Explique a fotossíntese", ou "Me ajude a entender recursão".
Learn.sug1: Me ensine o básico de cálculo
Learn.sug4: Me prepare para a prova de física

Panic.title: Modo Pânico
Panic.description: Gere um pacote completo de estudo em segundos

Share.invalidLink: Este link pode ser inválido ou o chat não é mais compartilhado.

Components.clickToFlip: Clique em um card para virar
Components.pasteText: Cole o texto gerado por IA aqui para humanizar...
Components.selectAction: Selecione uma ação da barra de ferramentas para gerar conteúdo.
Components.selectToCite: Selecione o texto e clique em "Citar" para gerar fontes.
Components.pasteEssayTopic: Cole o tópico da sua redação, parágrafo ou texto aqui...

hero.badge: Your AI study companion is here
hero.subtitle: Snap a photo of any homework question. Get step-by-step solutions instantly. Write essays. Humanize AI text. Study for exams.
hero.ctaFree: 📸 Solve your first question — No signup needed
hero.freeBadge: ✨ Free tier — no credit card, no signup. Start solving instantly.

features.title: Everything a student needs
features.subtitle: Homework solver, essay writer, text humanizer, and exam tutor — all in one app.
features.solveDesc: Photo or text → step-by-step solution in 5 seconds. Ask follow-ups, get alternative methods, generate practice questions.
features.writeDesc: Outline → draft → citations → polish. AI-powered essay writer with APA citations and academic tone built in.
features.humanizeDesc: Paste any AI-generated text → get natural, human-sounding output. Three modes: Academic, Casual, Professional.
features.learnDesc: Panic Mode: enter subject → get a 1-page summary, 10 exam questions, flashcards, and a 2-hour study plan. Instantly.

compare.title: The old way vs. the Axiom way
compare.subtitle: Students deserve instant, interactive help. Not static answers behind a paywall.

pricing.title: Less than 2 coffees a month
pricing.subtitle: Premium AI study tools. No limits. No waiting.

cta.title: Stop waiting. Start solving.
cta.subtitle: Your next homework is due in hours. Axiom solves it in seconds. Free. No signup.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content: When you create an account, we collect your email address, name, and profile picture (if signing in with Google). When you use our services, we process the questions and text you submit to provide AI-generated responses.

sections.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use your information to provide, maintain, and improve our services. Your submitted questions are processed by AI models to generate responses and are not shared with third parties for marketing purposes.

sections.title: 3. Data Storage
sections.content: Your account data is stored securely using Supabase (hosted on AWS). Payment information is processed and stored by Stripe — we never have access to your full card details.

sections.title: 4. Third-Party Services
sections.content: We use the following third-party services:
list: Google Gemini API — for AI-powered responses
Supabase — for authentication and data storage

sections.title: 5. Your Rights
sections.content: You can request deletion of your account and associated data at any time by contacting us at support@axiom.study.

sections.title: 6. Contact
sections.content: For questions about this privacy policy, contact us at support@axiom.study.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing or using Axiom, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.

sections.title: 2. Description of Service
sections.content: Axiom is an AI-powered study companion that provides homework solutions, essay writing assistance, text humanization, and exam preparation tools. Responses are generated by AI and should be used as a learning aid, not submitted as your own work.

sections.title: 3. User Accounts
sections.content: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials. You must be at least 13 years old to use this service.

sections.title: 4. Subscription & Billing
sections.content: Pro subscriptions are billed monthly at $9.99/month. You can cancel at any time through the Settings page. Refunds are handled on a case-by-case basis.

sections.title: 5. Acceptable Use
sections.content: You agree not to use Axiom for any illegal purposes, to harass others, or to attempt to circumvent rate limits or security measures.

sections.title: 6. Disclaimer
sections.content: AI-generated content may contain errors. Axiom is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not responsible for academic consequences resulting from the use of our service.

sections.title: 7. Contact
sections.content: For questions about these terms, contact us at support@axiom.study.
